notes:
🚀 BeefText AI v0.2.0 — Snippet Trigger Fix

## Bug Fixes
- **Fixed snippet trigger detection**: Snippets now trigger correctly when typing a keyword directly, without needing to press another key first
- **Keyboard feedback loop prevention**: Simulated keystrokes (backspace, paste) are no longer captured by the keyboard hook, preventing buffer corruption
- **Navigation key combo breakers**: Arrow keys, Home/End, Insert/Delete now properly reset the trigger buffer

## Technical Improvements
- Added active/inactive state to keyboard hook to prevent feedback during text substitution
- Improved reliability of text expansion in all applications
